title: llpswsounds
description: 丰富了游戏的音效，包含切换、挥舞、合成道具等音效[The game's sound effects have been enriched, including switching, swinging, and crafting props]
body:
# 此模组移植了旧版的动态环绕的部分功能。
## This mod ported some of the features of the old version of Dynamic Surround.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

作者吐槽道：1.20.1没有找到太多这一类模组
[The author quipped: 1.20.1 didn't find too many mods of this type]

</details>

模组致力于添加玩家与道具交互时产生的音效，以获得更加有趣的游戏体验。[The mod focuses on adding sound effects when players interact with items for a more fun gaming experience]

该模组需要客户端与服务端同时安装[The module needs to be installed on both the client and the server]

安装模组后，玩家将会获得更具备沉浸感的游戏体验，当玩家主手切换普通道具、切换工具道具、切换武器道具、切换盔甲道具等都将具备不同的音效，当玩家挥舞剑、斧头等道具时也将播放不同的音效。至于玩家合成道具时，也将播放音效，具体的音效可以通过配置进行简易的分配。[After installing the mod, players will get a more immersive gaming experience, when the player switches between normal props, tool props, weapon props, armor props, etc., there will be different sound effects, and when the player wields swords, axes and other props, there will also be different sound effects. As for the player's synthesis of items, sound effects will also be played, and specific sound effects can be easily assigned through configuration.]

注意，当前模组将注意力放在了玩家与道具交互时产生的音效，因此并不包含脚步声等效果，若有需求，请搭配相应模组食用。[Note that the current mod focuses on the sound effects generated when the player interacts with the props, so it does not include effects such as footsteps.]
